name: Kaalipotka
overview: In a gritty urban jungle, four women - Srima, Rani, Rinku, and Minoti - are drawn into chaos after Minoti's husband's freak accident. A cover-up spirals into deceit, murder, and revenge as ex-con Rana and the police hunt them

trailers.title: Kaalipotka | Official Trailer | Bangla ZEE5 Original | Swastika, Shruti, Sreya, Himika, Anirban
